children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Upon the written request of the Secretary of the Conference of the Majority or the Secretary of the Conference of the Minority, the Secretary of the Senate shall transfer from the appropriations account appropriated under the subheading “” under the heading “” such amount as the Secretary of the Conference of the Majority or the Secretary of the Conference of the Minority shall specify to the appropriations account under the heading “” within the contingent fund of the Senate.offices of the secretaries of the conference of the majority and the conference of the minoritySalaries, Officers and Employeesmiscellaneous items

children.heading: Authority to incur expenses
children.label: b Authority to incur expenses
children.text: The Secretary of the Conference of the Majority or the Secretary of the Conference of the Minority may incur such expenses as may be necessary or appropriate. Expenses incurred by the Secretary of the Conference of the Majority or the Secretary of the Conference of the Minority shall be paid from the amount transferred under subsection (a) by the Secretary of the Conference of the Majority or the Secretary of the Conference of the Minority and upon vouchers approved by the Secretary of the Conference of the Majority or the Secretary of the Conference of the Minority, as applicable.

children.heading: Authority to advance sums
children.label: c Authority to advance sums
children.text: The Secretary of the Senate may advance such sums as may be necessary to defray expenses incurred in carrying out subsections (a) and (b).

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: d Effective date
children.text: This section shall apply to fiscal year 2008 and each fiscal year thereafter.
